# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
  labels:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled

---
# Frontend Service Deployment with Linkerd proxy injection
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: frontend
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-request: "100m"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-request: "64Mi"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-limit: "500m"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-limit: "256Mi"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-log-level: "warn"
      labels:
        app: frontend
        version: v1
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: frontend-sa
      containers:
        - name: frontend
          image: frontend:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
              name: http
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "100m"
              memory: "128Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "512Mi"
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 30

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: frontend
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    app: frontend
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 80
      targetPort: 8080
      protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: frontend-sa
  namespace: microservices

---
# Backend API Service Deployment with Linkerd proxy injection
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: backend-api
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend-api
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-request: "150m"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-request: "128Mi"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-limit: "1000m"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-limit: "512Mi"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-log-level: "warn"
        config.linkerd.io/opaque-ports: "3306,6379"
      labels:
        app: backend-api
        version: v1
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: backend-api-sa
      containers:
        - name: backend-api
          image: backend-api:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8443
              name: https
            - containerPort: 9090
              name: grpc
          env:
            - name: DATABASE_HOST
              value: "database.microservices.svc.cluster.local"
            - name: CACHE_HOST
              value: "cache.microservices.svc.cluster.local"
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "200m"
              memory: "256Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "1000m"
              memory: "1Gi"
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: 8443
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8443
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 30

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: backend-api
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    app: backend-api
  ports:
    - name: https
      port: 443
      targetPort: 8443
      protocol: TCP
    - name: grpc
      port: 9090
      targetPort: 9090
      protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: backend-api-sa
  namespace: microservices

---
# Database Service Deployment
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: database
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: database
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
        config.linkerd.io/opaque-ports: "3306"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-log-level: "info"
      labels:
        app: database
        version: v1
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: database-sa
      containers:
        - name: database
          image: mysql:8.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 3306
              name: mysql
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "1Gi"
            limits:
              cpu: "2000m"
              memory: "4Gi"

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: database
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    app: database
  ports:
    - name: mysql
      port: 3306
      targetPort: 3306
      protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: database-sa
  namespace: microservices

---
# Cache Service Deployment
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: cache
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: cache
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
        config.linkerd.io/opaque-ports: "6379"
      labels:
        app: cache
        version: v1
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: cache-sa
      containers:
        - name: cache
          image: redis:7-alpine
          ports:
            - containerPort: 6379
              name: redis
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "100m"
              memory: "128Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "512Mi"

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: cache
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    app: cache
  ports:
    - name: redis
      port: 6379
      targetPort: 6379
      protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: cache-sa
  namespace: microservices

---
# ============================================================
# Server Policies - Define how each server accepts traffic
# ============================================================

# Server policy for frontend HTTP port
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: frontend-http
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
# Server policy for backend-api HTTPS port
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: backend-api-https
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend-api
  port: https
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
# Server policy for backend-api gRPC port
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: backend-api-grpc
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend-api
  port: grpc
  proxyProtocol: gRPC

---
# Server policy for database MySQL port
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: database-mysql
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: database
  port: mysql
  proxyProtocol: opaque

---
# Server policy for cache Redis port
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: cache-redis
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: cache
  port: redis
  proxyProtocol: opaque

---
# ============================================================
# ServerAuthorization Policies - Define who can access each server
# ============================================================

# Allow frontend to receive traffic from any meshed client (e.g., ingress)
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: frontend-allow-ingress
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: frontend-http
  client:
    # Allow traffic from any authenticated (meshed) identity
    meshTLS:
      identities:
        - "*.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"
    # Also allow unauthenticated traffic from ingress controllers
    unauthenticated: true

---
# Allow only frontend to access backend-api HTTPS
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: backend-api-allow-frontend-https
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: backend-api-https
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: frontend-sa
          namespace: microservices

---
# Allow only frontend to access backend-api gRPC
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: backend-api-allow-frontend-grpc
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: backend-api-grpc
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: frontend-sa
          namespace: microservices

---
# Allow only backend-api to access the database
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: database-allow-backend-api
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: database-mysql
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: backend-api-sa
          namespace: microservices

---
# Allow only backend-api to access the cache
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: cache-allow-backend-api
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: cache-redis
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: backend-api-sa
          namespace: microservices

---
# ============================================================
# HTTPRoute policies for fine-grained HTTP path authorization
# ============================================================

# Define HTTP routes for backend-api
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: HTTPRoute
metadata:
  name: backend-api-routes
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  parentRefs:
    - name: backend-api-https
      kind: Server
      group: policy.linkerd.io
  rules:
    - matches:
        - path:
            value: /api/v1/
            type: PathPrefix
          method: GET
    - matches:
        - path:
            value: /api/v1/
            type: PathPrefix
          method: POST
    - matches:
        - path:
            value: /healthz
            type: Exact
          method: GET
    - matches:
        - path:
            value: /ready
            type: Exact
          method: GET

---
# Authorization policy for backend-api HTTP routes - only frontend can call API
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: backend-api-authz
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: HTTPRoute
    name: backend-api-routes
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: frontend-identity
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
# MeshTLS Authentication - identify frontend service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: frontend-identity
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
    - "frontend-sa.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"

---
# MeshTLS Authentication - identify backend-api service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: backend-api-identity
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
    - "backend-api-sa.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"

---
# ============================================================
# Network Authentication for external traffic (non-meshed)
# ============================================================

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: NetworkAuthentication
metadata:
  name: ingress-network
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  networks:
    - cidr: 10.0.0.0/8
    - cidr: 172.16.0.0/12
    - cidr: 192.168.0.0/16

---
# ============================================================
# Default deny-all policy for the namespace
# ============================================================

# Deny all unauthenticated traffic by default on the backend-api
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: deny-all-backend-api
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    description: "Default deny for backend-api - overridden by explicit allows above"
spec:
  server:
    name: backend-api-https
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts: []

---
# ============================================================
# Service Profiles for traffic shaping and retries
# ============================================================

apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServiceProfile
metadata:
  name: backend-api.microservices.svc.cluster.local
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  routes:
    - name: GET /api/v1/resources
      condition:
        method: GET
        pathRegex: /api/v1/resources
      responseClasses:
        - condition:
            status:
              min: 500
              max: 599
          isFailure: true
      isRetryable: true
      timeout: 10s
    - name: POST /api/v1/resources
      condition:
        method: POST
        pathRegex: /api/v1/resources
      responseClasses:
        - condition:
            status:
              min: 500
              max: 599
          isFailure: true
      isRetryable: false
      timeout: 30s
    - name: GET /healthz
      condition:
        method: GET
        pathRegex: /healthz
      isRetryable: true
      timeout: 5s
  retryBudget:
    retryRatio: 0.2
    minRetriesPerSecond: 10
    ttl: 120s

---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServiceProfile
metadata:
  name: frontend.microservices.svc.cluster.local
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  routes:
    - name: GET /
      condition:
        method: GET
        pathRegex: /
      responseClasses:
        - condition:
            status:
              min: 500
              max: 599
          isFailure: true
      isRetryable: true
      timeout: 15s
  retryBudget:
    retryRatio: 0.2
    minRetriesPerSecond: 10
    ttl: 120s
